overall_assessment: The bounded package shows a stronger corrected-baseline RR-AUTH-04 state with broader validation and no clear functional regression inside the provided evidence, but it is still not closure-ready because the package explicitly records that the required corrected-baseline rerun review set, triple-audit round 02, the Claude comparison, and final orchestration guards are not yet fully attached or waived.

findings.title: Closure evidence remains incomplete against the package's own gate definition
findings.rationale: The package's Closure Gate Status, Current Closure Findings, and Blockers sections each state that RR-AUTH-04 is still blocked pending fresh rerun no-context review lanes, triple-audit round 02, the Claude fourth-auditor comparison, and final orchestration guards. On the provided authority set, recommending close would overrun the packet's own stated evidence floor rather than confirm it has been met.
findings.suggested_action: Keep RR-AUTH-04 open until the corrected-baseline rerun review outputs, triple-audit round 02, the Claude comparison record, and final orchestration-guard reconciliation are attached to the governing authority set or explicitly waived.
